REGISTER TO DONATE TODAY!Earn $100-$200 Today!

About Us

Texas Plasma Centers

Texas Plasma Centers are Locally Owned & Operated Company

We help people in Your Local Area to find good paying plasma donation centers, We help with getting qualified to donate and registering

How to earn $100-$200 Today!

Step by Step Process To Donate Plasma

Step 1: Qualify To Donate Plasma

To qualify to donate plasma, you must meet the following general requirements:

Be at least 18 years old

Weigh at least 110 pounds

Be in good health

Pass a medical exam and screening

Test negative for hepatitis, HIV, and Parvo B19

Not have gotten a tattoo within the last 4 months

REGISTER HERE

Step 2: Bring The Following:

Government-issued ID: A valid driver's license, passport, military ID, or state-issued ID card

Proof of Social Security: A Social Security card, W-2 form, paycheck stub, or Social Security Verification

Proof of residency: A current lease, utility bill, or piece of mail postmarked within the last 30 days

The name on your ID must match the name on your Social Security card.
If you're not a US resident, you'll need a US Visa or Government ID.

REGISTER HERE

Step 3: Medical Screening

You must have a pre-donation physical which includes answering medical history questions, tests for viruses such as HIV and Hepatitis and evaluating your protein and hemoglobin levels

REGISTER HERE

Step 4: Donate Plasma & Get Paid

You sit down on one of the donation tables where a staff member hooks You up to a donation machine.

The donation process can take between 1-1.5hrs depending on how busy the center is.

You get paid via a debit card right after You are done donating. You can go to a ATM and get cash from the machine

REGISTER HERE

I just wanted to thank Texas Plasma Centers for helping me find a donation center that pays me more than some of the other centers were offering.

I really never donated plasma before but needed some help with paying my bills so found this website and was able to earn a few hundred dollars in one month. Thanks.
